channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Breaking News: European regulators hit Google with a $1 bill…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: European regulators hit Google with a $1 billion fine for illegally undercutting competition through its dominance as a search engine, a move likely to intensify trans-Atlantic trade tensions.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: European regulators hit Google with a $1 billion fine for illegally undercutting competition through its dominance as a search engine, a move likely to intensify trans-Atlantic trade tensions.

item.title: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adap…
item.author: Colin Dickey (@colindickey.com)
item.description: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.
item.content:encoded: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.

item.title: 最近、ツレが「明日のお弁当に入れて～」とおかずをよく買ってくる。今回はでっかいメンツカツ。まあラクでいいんだがね。ねぎ入…
item.author: 白央篤司 hakuo atsushi (@hakuo416.bsky.social)
item.description: 最近、ツレが「明日のお弁当に入れて～」とおかずをよく買ってくる。今回はでっかいメンツカツ。まあラクでいいんだがね。ねぎ入り玉子焼き、ゴーヤーとちりめんじゃこのカレー風味炒め、紅ショウガ、昆布の佃煮ちょいを添える。
item.content:encoded: 最近、ツレが「明日のお弁当に入れて～」とおかずをよく買ってくる。今回はでっかいメンツカツ。まあラクでいいんだがね。ねぎ入り玉子焼き、ゴーヤーとちりめんじゃこのカレー風味炒め、紅ショウガ、昆布の佃煮ちょいを添える。

item.title: Texas Instruments reports Q2 revenue up 23% YoY to $5.46B, a…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Texas Instruments reports Q2 revenue up 23% YoY to $5.46B, above $5.26B est., net income up 53% to $1.98B, and forecasts $5.65B-$6.15B in Q3 revenue, above est. (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Texas Instruments reports Q2 revenue up 23% YoY to $5.46B, above $5.26B est., net income up 53% to $1.98B, and forecasts $5.65B-$6.15B in Q3 revenue, above est. (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink

item.title: おはようございます☀️ お昼を過ぎてしまいましたが、今日もよいお天気ですね✨ ここ１年くらいの間、読んでいる本がいつ…
item.author: mimi🍰 (@mimi32.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます☀️

お昼を過ぎてしまいましたが、今日もよいお天気ですね✨

ここ１年くらいの間、読んでいる本がいつも何らか意味深で、自分の感情に寄り添っていたり、本と会話したりしている

不思議な感覚で毎日ふわふわしてる

皆さんにとって今日も素敵な一日となりますように🕊️
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます☀️

お昼を過ぎてしまいましたが、今日もよいお天気ですね✨

ここ１年くらいの間、読んでいる本がいつも何らか意味深で、自分の感情に寄り添っていたり、本と会話したりしている

不思議な感覚で毎日ふわふわしてる

皆さんにとって今日も素敵な一日となりますように🕊️

item.title: Really cute how guys who have never read The Illiad or The O…
item.author: Canis Latranscendental (@grimmycoyote.bsky.social)
item.description: Really cute how guys who have never read The Illiad or The Odyssey suddenly have opinions about ancient Greek literature.
item.content:encoded: Really cute how guys who have never read The Illiad or The Odyssey suddenly have opinions about ancient Greek literature.

item.title: Uusin maalaukseni nimeltä: "Pirkko-Liisa ei usko gravitaatio…
item.author: elinafuturist (@elinafuturist.bsky.social)
item.description:
Uusin maalaukseni nimeltä:
"Pirkko-Liisa ei usko gravitaatioon ja muuhun hömppään"

Akryyli, canvas.

Tää maalaus on kyllä terapeuttista, mutta ainoa ongelma on, että mitä mä teen näillä valmiilla tuotoksilla?!? 😅
item.content:encoded:
Uusin maalaukseni nimeltä:
"Pirkko-Liisa ei usko gravitaatioon ja muuhun hömppään"

Akryyli, canvas.

Tää maalaus on kyllä terapeuttista, mutta ainoa ongelma on, että mitä mä teen näillä valmiilla tuotoksilla?!? 😅

item.title: The risks are real. But banning children from the internet c…
item.author: WIRED (@wired.com)
item.description: The risks are real. But banning children from the internet could create new problems without solving the ones that really matter. www.wired.com/story/bannin...
item.content:encoded: The risks are real. But banning children from the internet could create new problems without solving the ones that really matter. www.wired.com/story/bannin...

item.title: The UK economy is fragile and it's Gen Z that's feeling the …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
The UK economy is fragile and it's Gen Z that's feeling the heat. Whether it's AI threatening entry level jobs or buying their first home, younger Britons are feeling more pessimistic than other generations. bloom.bg/3TQo7pi

📷: Brook Mitchell/Getty Images
item.content:encoded:
The UK economy is fragile and it's Gen Z that's feeling the heat. Whether it's AI threatening entry level jobs or buying their first home, younger Britons are feeling more pessimistic than other generations. bloom.bg/3TQo7pi

📷: Brook Mitchell/Getty Images

item.title: おたがいに見た夢を交換していた姉の麦と弟の太郎は、戦時下の令嬢あやめと出会い、やがて一つの深い場所へと流れ込む。夢と現実…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
おたがいに見た夢を交換していた姉の麦と弟の太郎は、戦時下の令嬢あやめと出会い、やがて一つの深い場所へと流れ込む。夢と現実、愛と暴力の境界を越え、芥川賞作家が8年ぶりに放つ圧倒的な傑作長編。

朝吹真理子
『ゆめ』
www.kawade.co.jp/np/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
おたがいに見た夢を交換していた姉の麦と弟の太郎は、戦時下の令嬢あやめと出会い、やがて一つの深い場所へと流れ込む。夢と現実、愛と暴力の境界を越え、芥川賞作家が8年ぶりに放つ圧倒的な傑作長編。

朝吹真理子
『ゆめ』
www.kawade.co.jp/np/isbn/9784...

item.title: The U.S. Food and Drug and Administration said Wednesday it …
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug and Administration said Wednesday it is investigating an additional cyclospora outbreak that the agency said has sickened at least 72 people. It is the latest of four continuing cyclospora outbreaks being investigated by the FDA.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. Food and Drug and Administration said Wednesday it is investigating an additional cyclospora outbreak that the agency said has sickened at least 72 people. It is the latest of four continuing cyclospora outbreaks being investigated by the FDA.

item.title: Tämä kukoistava lintuparatiisi Lappeenrannassa oli vain kolm…
item.author: Kerttu Kotakorpi (@kerttukotakorpi.bsky.social)
item.description:
Tämä kukoistava lintuparatiisi Lappeenrannassa oli vain kolme vuotta sitten entinen turpeentuotantoalue. Tällaistakin voidaan tehdä uhanalaisen lintulajiston hyväksi.

yle.fi/a/74-20230405
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Repetition Explaining to children in nature that a tree is …
item.author: Green is a mission (@greenisamission.bsky.social)
item.description:
Repetition

Explaining to children in nature that a tree is alive, that it communicates with other trees, that it breathes in and out, and that trees also sleep at night, creates an understanding, and what children understand they will protect throughout their lives.💚☘️🌱🌿🌲🌳
item.content:encoded:
Repetition

Explaining to children in nature that a tree is alive, that it communicates with other trees, that it breathes in and out, and that trees also sleep at night, creates an understanding, and what children understand they will protect throughout their lives.💚☘️🌱🌿🌲🌳

item.title: omg, I just got an email from my agent that my children's bo…
item.author: ashley fairbanks (@ziibiing.com)
item.description:
omg, I just got an email from my agent that my children's book hit its advance earn back after the first year of sales, so I actually get royalties and a bonus now!

i never expected to make any money off of it after my advance, but it's so cool that like 10,000 copies are just out there!
item.content:encoded:
omg, I just got an email from my agent that my children's book hit its advance earn back after the first year of sales, so I actually get royalties and a bonus now!

i never expected to make any money off of it after my advance, but it's so cool that like 10,000 copies are just out there!

item.author: skate witch (@skatewitch.bsky.social)

item.title: Kotasaari on rohkaiseva esimerkki paljon puhutusta ennallist…
item.author: Oras Tynkkynen (@orastynkkynen.vihreat.fi)
item.description: Kotasaari on rohkaiseva esimerkki paljon puhutusta ennallistamisesta: vain kolmessa vuodessa turpeenkaivuun jättämälle raiskiolle on saatu synnytettyä arvokas lintukeidas.
item.content:encoded: Kotasaari on rohkaiseva esimerkki paljon puhutusta ennallistamisesta: vain kolmessa vuodessa turpeenkaivuun jättämälle raiskiolle on saatu synnytettyä arvokas lintukeidas.

item.title: Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who die…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who died after not getting a vitamin K shot: tubes inserted in their airways, blood transfusions.

They’re excruciating to read because they underscore how preventable these deaths could have been.

(Published May)
item.content:encoded:
Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who died after not getting a vitamin K shot: tubes inserted in their airways, blood transfusions.

They’re excruciating to read because they underscore how preventable these deaths could have been.

(Published May)

item.title: France recorded at least 5,700 more deaths than usual during…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: France recorded at least 5,700 more deaths than usual during a historic heat wave last month, the public health agency says, sharply increasing its estimates of the feared toll from record-shattering temperatures.
item.content:encoded: France recorded at least 5,700 more deaths than usual during a historic heat wave last month, the public health agency says, sharply increasing its estimates of the feared toll from record-shattering temperatures.

item.title: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the S…
item.author: REMALONE (@ipasa.bsky.social)
item.description: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him when he watches him on TV. Truly, this Spanish team ❤️
item.content:encoded: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him when he watches him on TV. Truly, this Spanish team ❤️

item.title: Someone in DC set up a “little free blockbuster” with DVDs i…

item.content:encoded: Someone in DC set up a “little free blockbuster” with DVDs inside instead of books lol

item.author: Chasbell 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿🇮🇪🇮🇹🇨🇦 (@chasbell.bsky.social)

item.author: Bert’s Books (@bertsbooks.bsky.social)
item.description: Your new favourite book is waiting for you… - Michael
item.content:encoded: Your new favourite book is waiting for you… - Michael

item.title: One doctor’s recommendation to deny a 43-year-woman coverage…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
One doctor’s recommendation to deny a 43-year-woman coverage “contained errors on practically every aspect” of her condition, the Labor Department said in 2012.

United and other insurers continued to hire the doctor over the next decade.

(Published Dec. 2024)
item.content:encoded:
One doctor’s recommendation to deny a 43-year-woman coverage “contained errors on practically every aspect” of her condition, the Labor Department said in 2012.

United and other insurers continued to hire the doctor over the next decade.

(Published Dec. 2024)
